query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A square-format monochromatic image in deep black and pale cream tones. A dark field occupies the majority of the frame, interrupted by a lighter, diffuse area in the upper portion that appears to emanate from an unseen source. Subtle variations in tone suggest vertical and horizontal structures, though individual forms resist clear identification. No figures, text, or discrete objects are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily blurred with motion streaks and dense film grain, this abstract monochromatic image dissolves its subject into near-total obscurity. Deliberate underexposure buries most information in crushed black shadows, while a muted, faded palette and weak midtone separation generate an oppressive, suffocating mood. The scene offers no identifiable objects or figures, instead evoking atmospheric dread through unrelenting darkness and tactile analog texture.
